text: Why did Mr. Gilbert telephone Dr. Millington?
zh: 为什么吉尔伯特先生给米灵顿医生打电话?

text: While John Gilbert was in hospital,
zh: 约翰·吉尔伯特住院期间,

text: he asked his doctor to tell him
whether his operation had been successful,
but the doctor refused to do so.
The following day,
the patient asked for a bedside telephone.
zh: 这位病人要求在床边装一部电话。

text: When he was alone,
he telephoned the hospital exchange
and asked for Doctor Millington.
When the doctor answered the phone,
Mr. Gilbert said he was inquiring about a certain patient,
zh: 吉尔伯特先生说他在打听一位病人的情况,

text: a Mr. John Gilbert.
zh: 这位病人叫约翰·吉尔伯特先生。

text: He asked if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful
zh: 他问吉尔伯特先生的手术是否成功,

text: and the doctor told him that it had been.
zh: 医生告诉他手术很成功。

text: He then asked when Mr. Gilbert would be allowed to
zh: 接着他问吉尔伯特先生什么时候可以

text: go home and the doctor told him
that he would have to stay
in hosptial for another two weeks.
Then Dr. Millington asked the caller
zh: 这时米灵顿医生问打电话的人,

text: if he was a relative of the patient.
'No,' the patient answered,
'I am Mr. John Gilbert.'
